Place Value.definition: Place value is the value of each digit in a number based on its position...

flashcard_deck.back: The value of a digit based on its position in a number (e.g., Tens, Hundreds).

flashcard_deck.front: What is the difference between Place Value and Total Value?
flashcard_deck.back: Place Value is the position (e.g., Thousands). Total Value is the actual worth of the digit in that position (e.g., 8,000).

flashcard_deck.front: What do we look at when rounding off to the nearest hundred?
flashcard_deck.back: We check the digit in the tens place. If it is 5 or more, we round up. If it is less than 5, we round down.

study_plan_milestones.Week 1: Master reading and writing numbers up to 1,000,000 using local Kenyan population datasets.
study_plan_milestones.Week 2: Identify Place Value and Total Value of any digit up to millions without confusion.
study_plan_milestones.Week 3: Practice rounding off large figures using realistic M-Pesa statements and transaction records.
study_plan_milestones.Week 4: Take the Mwalimu Grand Review Challenge using past KPSEA/KNEC questions.
